title: cydonia oblonga var. maliformis
intro: Cydonia oblonga var. maliformis, also known as the white pear or pearsquat, is a variety of the pear tree (Cydonia oblonga) that produces small, round, and white fruit. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Cydonia oblonga var. maliformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to address various health concerns.
